parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title New User Workflow

participant User

box "uFR Nano" #E2E2E2
participant NFC
end box

box "Raspberry Pi" #D9D9D9
participant WebInterface
participant PiPass
participant DB
end box

alt Tap First Example
    User -> NFC : 1 Tap
    PiPass -> NFC : 2 Polling Service
    NFC -> PiPass : 3 Ack Tap
    PiPass -> DB : 4 User Lookup
    DB -> PiPass : 5 Zero Results
    PiPass -> PiPass : 6 Set user state to new.\nAwait WebInterface interaction.
    User -> WebInterface : 7 Complete Registration Workflow
else Web Create
    User -> WebInterface : 8 Start Registration Workflow
    WebInterface -> PiPass : 9 Save registration.\nAwait next unassigned tap.
    NFC -> PiPass : 10 Ack Tap
    PiPass -> DB : 11 User Lookup
    DB -> PiPass : 12 Zero Results
    PiPass -> PiPass : 13 Complete Registration
    PiPass -> DB : 14 Save user details
    PiPass -> WebInterface : 15 Ack user registration
    WebInterface -> User : 16 Confirm
end

@enduml
```
